caption:
Men's looks of the week!

Three looks, one feeling: that particular ease that arrives when the air softens, the days stretch longer, and getting dressed becomes a small pleasure rather than a decision. From bouclette softness to stone-washed linen, these are the fabrics that understand the rhythm of this place. Swipe through and settle in — the season is just beginning.

Sweat & shorts: @hartford
Linen overshirt (look 2): @crossley.italy
Linen shirt & trousers (look 2): @anerkjendt_official
Linen shirt & trousers (look 3): @nousaconcept
Necklaces: @daniel_burj
Hats: @kangol
